sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pak tung zingdai a nom lai-in,
Keimah guak huan sungah ka vak hi;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ama aa ka hih hong gen hi;
Amah tawh omkhawm a nuam ka sakna,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Vasate’n zong ngai khipkhep uh hi;
a hong sak tua la ngaih mahmah a,
Ka bil kha’n ka zaza hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Amah tawh ka om khawm den nuam hi;
ni” hong cihna aw ka za hi.
